supervisor.reason: The installer migration scope is complete: install.sh now creates a ~/.local/bin launcher, removes legacy ~/.dormammu/bin PATH exports from .bashrc, conditionally adds ~/.local/bin when the current PATH is missing it, and focused installer validation passed.

bootstrap.goal: Migrate install.sh to a ~/.local/bin launcher flow, clean up legacy ~/.dormammu/bin PATH bootstrap lines, and add explicit shell reload guidance.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume after the install launcher migration slice. install.sh now creates a ~/.local/bin/dormammu launcher, removes installer-managed legacy ~/.dormammu/bin PATH exports from .bashrc, adds ~/.local/bin only when the current shell PATH is missing it, prints source ~/.bashrc guidance, and the focused installer regression test passed.

items.text: Phase 1. Inspect the installer entrypoint and existing shell PATH bootstrap behavior for dormammu
Phase 2. Replace the exposed install command path with a ~/.local/bin/dormammu launcher while preserving the internal installed binary
Phase 3. Remove legacy ~/.dormammu/bin PATH exports and only add ~/.local/bin to .bashrc when the current shell PATH is missing it
Phase 4. Update the installer output so operators are prompted to run source ~/.bashrc before using the launcher command
Phase 5. Add and run focused regression coverage for the installer migration behavior

next_action: Prepare a commit for the validated install launcher migration, or extend the operator docs around the new ~/.local/bin shell bootstrap flow.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This slice targets install-time launcher and shell PATH management.
The installer now creates a ~/.local/bin/dormammu launcher that execs the installed venv binary.
Installer-managed legacy ~/.dormammu/bin PATH export lines are now removed from .bashrc during installation.
The installer only appends ~/.local/bin to .bashrc when the current shell PATH does not already include that directory.
Focused validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_script`.
